title: ProcessModel
description: Process model settings for the application pool worker processes.

idle_timeout.description: The idle timeout in minutes before a worker process is shut down.

max_processes.description: The maximum number of worker processes for the application pool (web garden).

pinging_enabled.description: Whether health monitoring pings are enabled.

ping_interval.description: The interval in seconds between health monitoring pings.

ping_response_time.description: The maximum time in seconds allowed for a worker process to respond to a health ping.

shutdown_time_limit.description: The time in seconds allowed for a worker process to gracefully shut down.

startup_time_limit.description: The time in seconds allowed for a worker process to start up.

idle_timeout_action.description: The action to take when the idle timeout is reached.
